query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE unsubscribed = 0) as total_active_subscribers,
  (SELECT SUM(subscriber_count) FROM subscriber_lists) as sum_of_list_counts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers) as total_subscribers_all
